productDisplayName: Nike Women's Free Everyday White Orange Shoe
description: However way you choose to train, the women's Free XT Everyday Fit+ from nike delivers a perfect mix of flexibility and cushioned comfort that lasts all day long! nike Free XT technology uses full-length, multi-directional flex grooves to enhance flexibility and allow the foot to move more naturally while training, helping to strengthen it.Upper Combination no-sew synthetic and sandwich mesh upper for  a lightweight, supportive, flexible fit and excellent ventilation Seam-free overlays for added support and durability Comfort collar material for an enhanced fit Textile lining with Fitsole sockliner that moulds to the shape of the foot offering a custom fit with great support Flywire technology for lightweight, dynamic support Lace-up system for a snug, comfort fit Reflectivity for enhanced visibility in low-light conditions Midsole Lightweight, dual density midsole for soft cushioning Lightweight midsole with soft cushioning under the foot for heel-to-toe-comfort, support and durability Outsole Full-length, hot-knife multi-directional flex grooves to enhance flexibility and more natural movement Rubber pods on the heel and forefoot for multi-directional traction and control on various surfaces shoe careDo not machine washRemove dust and dirt with damp clean clothDo not store in direct sunlight
